full_description: Focus Timer is a productivity app designed to help you stay focused and on track with your tasks. Using the Pomodoro Technique, the app boosts concentration and efficiency by providing regular breaks and helping you avoid distractions. The customizable timer allows you to set the perfect work-to-break ratio for your needs, while the tracking features enable you to monitor your progress and adjust your workflow accordingly. With Focus Timer, you can prioritize tasks, manage your time more effectively, and achieve your goals. Key features include: customizable timer, Pomodoro Technique, task tracking, regular breaks, and progress monitoring.
